content: I'm currently chatting with you on my Android device, having screenshotted an email from ZocDoc and sent it to you, but I want to catch up this thread on the iPad. However, I don't have any other threads showing in the sidebar that I can toggle out of this thread and back into it. Is there another way that I can use to update the thread on the iPad to reflect what we are doing on the, or have done, on the Android device?
